original_selected_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
    
    ;; Arm state
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on bottom)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top, b3 on table (was b2 on table, b3 on top)
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on top, b5 in middle, b6 on table
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b7 on top, b8 in middle, b9 on table
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b10 on top, b11 second, b12 third, b13 on table
      (on-table b13)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm empty at goal
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
